tables.name: units
tables.label: Units
tables.description: Things being built: packages, apps, and cross-cutting projects.

tables.name: labels
tables.label: Labels
tables.description: Free-form tags applied to tasks (build-once, shared, R&D, decision, ...).

tables.name: milestones
tables.label: Milestones
tables.description: Rounds / phases of work over time (past rounds, now, next, future).

tables.name: tasks
tables.label: Tasks
tables.description: Units of work. Each task belongs to a milestone and many units and labels.

tables.name: links
tables.label: Links
tables.description: Directed dependency edges between tasks for the devgraph.

tables.name: decisions
tables.label: Decisions
tables.description: Shared question / decision queue: Claude queues questions and decisions, you answer them here.

tables.name: designs
tables.label: Designs
tables.description: Architecture, product, and project design notes for the platform.

tables.name: worklog
tables.label: Worklog
tables.description: What Claude did each run — a dated log so you can see overnight progress at a glance.

tables.name: profiles
tables.label: Profiles
tables.description: People / personas. Projects are grouped under a profile.

tables.name: projects
tables.label: Projects
tables.description: Projects, each associated to a profile.

tables.name: notes
tables.label: Notes
tables.description: Standalone notes that can be associated with one or more tasks.
